question: List the biographical data and student id for the students who take 2 or more classes and the students who have less than 2 detentions.
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, Students.bio_data FROM Students WHERE Students.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM Classes GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AND Students.student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Detention GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2);

back_translation.intent: 查找满足特定条件的学生数据
filters: Students.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM Classes GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)
Students.student_id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM Detention GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求同时满足两个条件的学生（选课≥2且detention<2），SQL通过两个子查询分别筛选选课≥2和detention<2的学生ID，并使用NOT IN排除detention≥2的情况，最终结果与原始问题语义完全一致。
